# Western Health & Safety – AI Index File

[PAGE]
/services/property-transactions-due-diligence.html – Environmental due diligence for property transactions including IAQ, asbestos, hazardous materials, and LEED/WELL air testing in Alberta & BC.

[PAGE]
/indoor-air-quality.html – Indoor air quality testing including mould, VOCs, smoke, and LEED/WELL air quality assessments in Alberta & BC.

[PAGE]
/hazardous-materials.html – Hazardous materials surveys including asbestos, lead, and designated substances for compliance and renovation planning.

[PAGE]
/worker-exposure-occupational-hygiene.html – Occupational hygiene and worker exposure assessments including air sampling and risk evaluation.

[PAGE]
/noise-physical-hazard-assessments.html – Noise exposure and physical hazard assessments for workplace safety and compliance.

[PAGE]
/emergency-response-disaster-services.html – Post-loss environmental testing including fire, smoke, and contamination assessments.

[IMAGE]
whs-property-due-diligence-calgary-2026-03.jpg – CIH-led environmental due diligence fieldwork in Calgary.
